mission.title: kubevirt: Replace cirros  in the kubevirt E2E Tests.
mission.description: Replace cirros  in the kubevirt E2E Tests.. Community-requested feature.

steps.title: Check current kubevirt deployment
steps.description:
Verify your kubevirt version and configuration:
```bash
kubectl get pods -n kubevirt -l app.kubernetes.io/name=kubevirt
helm list -n kubevirt 2>/dev/null || echo "Not installed via Helm"
```
This feature requires a working kubevirt installation.

steps.title: Review kubevirt configuration
steps.description:
Inspect the relevant kubevirt configuration:
```bash
kubectl get all -n kubevirt -l app.kubernetes.io/name=kubevirt
kubectl get configmap -n kubevirt -l app.kubernetes.io/part-of=kubevirt
```
The IBMZ (s390x) architecture does not support Cirros and due to this, We are not able to  run all the Kubevirt E2E Tests across various (compute,storage,network).

steps.title: Apply the fix for Replace cirros  in the kubevirt E2E Tests.
steps.description:
I have raised this draft pr: https://github.com/kubevirt/kubevirt/pull/15090. Where i have replaced  some of the tests from cirros to alpine. I have ran the different sig lanes(compute,storage,network,operator etc.) I compared these test results  with one of the open pr from the existing open prs in kubevirt. What i have observed is that even after replacing the cirros to alpine. There is no increase in the test time run. 
The test runs on the draft

See the source issue for community-verified solutions.

steps.title: Verify the feature works
steps.description:
Test that the new capability is working as expected:
```bash
kubectl get pods -n kubevirt -l app.kubernetes.io/name=kubevirt
kubectl get events -n kubevirt --sort-by='.lastTimestamp' | tail -10
```
Confirm the feature described in "Replace cirros  in the kubevirt E2E Tests." is functioning correctly.

resolution.summary: I have raised this draft pr: https://github.com/kubevirt/kubevirt/pull/15090. Where i have replaced  some of the tests from cirros to alpine. I have ran the different sig lanes(compute,storage,network,operator etc.) I compared these test results  with one of the open pr from the existing open prs in kubevirt. What i have observed is that even after replacing the cirros to alpine.

prerequisites.description: A running Kubernetes cluster with kubevirt installed or the issue environment reproducible.
